title: Crime Scene Report
content:
CASE FILE: #4683-B (Metropolitan Police). Deceased: Thomas Vane, 34... Body slumped at his desk, single gunshot wound to the right temple. A licensed .38 revolver in his right hand. Door locked from the inside with a heavy deadbolt; windows latched closed. No signs of forced entry.
NOTED CONTACTS: Helen Vane (Widow), Arthur Pendleton (Research Assistant).
INVESTIGATOR'S NOTE: Case closed as suicide. However, a glass of Scotch on the desk was half-full, and a fresh pack of cigarettes had been opened but none smoked.
Notably missing: his smartphone and his encrypted laptop. The police report claims they weren't found at the scene.
